subcodes.first_line: A mention from Our presence unto him who hath turned towards God, the Lord of the worlds, on a Day wherein every learned one hath turned away and every man of knowledge hath denied [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن اقبل الی الله رب العالمین فی یوم فیه اعرض کل عالم و انکر کل عارف
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
